about.title: A Swedish engineering house quietly building pallet lines for 38 years.
about.description: We design, manufacture and install pallet machinery from our facility in Sweden. Our equipment runs in the field at customer sites across Europe — including the Gyllsjö Träindustri block production line that has shaped how we engineer every machine since.
about.referenceText: One of Sweden's leading wood-block producers runs a Jointec extruder line with Siemens SIMATIC HMI control. Field-proven uptime, on Swedish soil.

pillars.title: Two businesses, one brand.
pillars.body: Exclusive CAPE agent for Scandinavia, Switzerland and Austria — new and second-hand. And the engineering house behind three own-developed machines sold worldwide.

pillars.title: Engineering, not just sales.
pillars.body: Our team specifies, installs, and supports every line we sell. The Siemens HMI screen on a Gyllsjö pallet block press was wired by the people who pick up the phone when you call.

pillars.title: Demo floor, not a brochure.
pillars.body: Our Åsljunga facility runs the Klotsproduktionslinje, Plastning Nonstop and Topfoil Pallet live, on the floor. You can see them in motion this week — 30 minutes from Båstad during FEFPEB.

items.headline: Pressed-wood block extruder line.

features: Closed material loop — your scrap becomes your input
Configurable block dimensions for EUR / EPAL / custom
Siemens SIMATIC HMI control
Designed for 24/7 operation, low-skill operator running

items.headline: Continuous stretch-wrapping with no line stops.
items.description: Wrap one pallet, queue the next, no shutdown. Automatic film-cut and re-thread between pallets. Throughput that keeps up with finishing.
features: Continuous in-feed — no production line stop
Automatic film-cut and re-thread between pallets
Configurable wrap recipes (turns, reinforcement, tension)
Compatible with conveyor or AGV in-feed

items.headline: Automatic top-foil application, in-line.
items.description: Lay a protective top sheet onto each pallet before it leaves finishing. Pairs naturally with Plastning Nonstop. Weather-proof, dust-proof, professional finish.
features: Automatic in-line top-foil application
Compatible with wrapped or unwrapped pallets
Configurable foil dimensions and overhang
Replaces hand-laid sheets — consistent, fast, no waste

We sell the full lineup new, source and refurbish second-hand units, and provide installation and after-sales support from Sweden.

klotsproduktionslinje.name: Klotsproduktionslinje
klotsproduktionslinje.headline: Pressed-wood block production — from waste wood to ready-to-nail blocks.
klotsproduktionslinje.description: A complete extruder line that takes shredded wood waste, mixes it with binder, and presses out engineered pressed-wood blocks in EUR/EPAL-style dimensions. Built by Jointec, installed by Jointec engineers, supported from Sweden. Field-proven at Gyllsjö Träindustri.

whatItIs.title: Stop importing pallet blocks. Make them on your own site.
whatItIs.body: Most European pallet manufacturers buy blocks from third-party suppliers, paying twice — once for the freight and once for the markup. The Klotsproduktionslinje closes that loop: your offcuts, your shredded waste pallets, your own facility. You feed the line raw material and a binder; out the other end come engineered blocks in the dimensions your pallets need, hour after hour.

features: Closed material loop — your scrap becomes your input
Configurable block dimensions for EUR / EPAL / custom pallets
Siemens SIMATIC HMI control, field-proven at Gyllsjö Träindustri
Integrates upstream with shredder, downstream with cutting and packing
Designed for 24/7 operation with low-skill operator running
Energy-efficient extrusion — no high-temperature kiln
applications: Pallet manufacturers wanting to insource block production
Pallet recyclers and repairers looking to upcycle scrap pallets
Sawmills with offcut streams seeking a circular revenue line
Logistics integrators producing pallets at their own sites

specs.footprint: Compact · fits a standard industrial bay

gallery.blocks: Pressed-wood blocks · output from the extruder
gallery.detail: Engineered block · close-up of pressed structure
gallery.fixture: Block on machine fixture · production line

plastning_nonstop.name: Plastning Nonstop
plastning_nonstop.headline: Continuous stretch-wrapping for pallet lines that never stop.
plastning_nonstop.description: Wrap one pallet, queue the next, no shutdown. Automatic film-cut and re-thread between pallets. The throughput partner for any continuous pallet production line — and the natural in-feed for the Topfoil Pallet finisher.

whatItIs.title: Remove the wrap stop. Keep the line moving.
whatItIs.body: Traditional stretch-wrappers stop the line every cycle: pallet wrapped, film cut, operator intervention, next pallet loaded. The cumulative downtime is the silent throughput killer in a continuous finishing area. Plastning Nonstop is built to follow the rhythm of the line — pallets enter, get wrapped, and exit while the next one is already loading.

features: Continuous in-feed — no production line stop
Automatic film-cut and re-thread between pallets
Configurable wrap recipes (turns, top/bottom reinforcement, tension)
Sensors for load-stability and film-break detection
Compatible with conveyor or AGV in-feed
Compact footprint vs. competing nonstop wrappers
applications: Pallet manufacturers running high-throughput finishing lines
FMCG, food & beverage and logistics with sustained pallet output
Plants wanting to remove the wrapping bottleneck
Operations replacing manual or stop-start automatic wrappers

gallery.line: Finished pallets · output from a wrapped line

topfoil_pallet.name: Topfoil Pallet
topfoil_pallet.headline: Automatic top-foil application — weatherproof, dustproof, professional finish.
topfoil_pallet.description: An in-line top-foil applicator that lays a protective sheet onto a wrapped pallet before it leaves the finishing area. Pairs naturally with Plastning Nonstop or any existing wrapper. Protects the load from rain, dust, and abrasion during outdoor storage and transit.

whatItIs.title: Finish every pallet, automatically.
whatItIs.body: If your finished pallets sit outdoors before dispatch, or travel through humid logistics chains, the top of the load is where damage happens first. Manual top-sheet application is slow, inconsistent and operator-dependent. Topfoil Pallet replaces that with an in-line module that applies a protective top sheet to every pallet — same operation, same cycle time, no operator intervention.

features: Automatic in-line top-foil application
Compatible with wrapped or unwrapped pallets
Configurable foil dimensions and overhang
Sealed against rain, dust, splash and UV (foil-grade dependent)
Replaces hand-laid sheets — consistent, fast, no waste
Roll-fed system with low-skill operator running
applications: Sensitive loads: food, electronics, pharmaceuticals, building materials
Logistics requiring professional-finish pallets for export

gallery.packaging: Top-foiled load · ready for outdoor storage

services.title: Everything around the machine matters as much as the machine.
services.description: Selling a pallet line is the easy part. Keeping it running for 20 years on three shifts is the work. Here is what comes with every Jointec installation — and every CAPE unit we sell.

casesPage.title: Lines running in the field, not lines on a brochure.
casesPage.description: Every Jointec line is engineered to one customer's floor. Here are the installations we are most proud of — the long-running ones that taught us what to build next.

labels.ctaBody: Most of our customers' installations are open to qualified visitors with a non-disclosure agreement. Tell us what you want to see; we will arrange the visit.

featured.headline: From scrap stream to engineered blocks — on the customer's own floor.
featured.summary: Gyllsjö Träindustri is one of Sweden's leading wood-block manufacturers. The Klotsproduktionslinje extruder line installed at their facility has been the reference installation that shaped how Jointec engineers every machine since.
featured.challenge: Block supply was external, exposed to import-price volatility, and disconnected from Gyllsjö's own scrap-wood streams. The team needed to close the loop on-site.
featured.solution: A Jointec Klotsproduktionslinje extruder line under Siemens SIMATIC HMI control. Integrated upstream with shredding and downstream with cutting and packing — installed and commissioned by Jointec engineers.
featured.result: Closed material loop. Block production decoupled from import markets. Reference installation Jointec returns to for every engineering decision.
featured.quote: When we wire up a new control screen for any customer, we still ask: would this make sense to the operator at Gyllsjö? That's the bar.

more.headline: Continuous wrap retrofit on a high-throughput finishing line.
more.summary: Replaced a stop-start wrapping setup with a Plastning Nonstop module. Removed the wrap stop as the line's throughput bottleneck.

more.headline: On-site block production from end-of-life pallets.
more.summary: Klotsproduktionslinje integrated with an existing pallet-disassembly line. Turning end-of-life pallets into new engineered blocks on the customer's own yard.

more.headline: Top-foil finishing for outdoor-stored finished goods pallets.
more.summary: Topfoil Pallet module added at end-of-line to seal finished pallets ahead of multi-day outdoor storage before dispatch.

more.headline: Refurbished CAPE nailing line.
more.summary: Replaced an ageing nailing setup with a Jointec-refurbished CAPE CP110 unit. Lower CAPEX than new, with the full Jointec install + support behind it.

more.headline: Integrated wrap + top-foil finishing line.
more.summary: Both Plastning Nonstop and Topfoil Pallet installed on the same finishing area. Pallets exit wrapped, top-foiled, and ready for outdoor storage in one continuous flow.

more.headline: Wooden cable-drum flange production via CAPE Bobimatic.
more.summary: Bobimatic combined line for wooden flange production, supplied and supported by Jointec under the CAPE agency for Austria.

articles.author: Jointec Engineering

aboutPage.title: Pallet machinery, engineered in Sweden since 1988.
aboutPage.description: Six engineers in southern Sweden who design, build, install and support pallet machinery for the people who make the world's pallets.

labels.storyTitle: Why we're still here after 38 years.
labels.principlesTitle: Four principles that explain most of our decisions.
labels.ctaTitle: Same office. Same engineers. Same number since 1988.
labels.ctaBody: Tell us what you're trying to make. We'll tell you whether we're the right engineering house.

story: Jointec was founded in 1988 to build one thing well — pallet machinery that runs for decades, on the customer's own floor, under the customer's own operators. Thirty-eight years later, the brief is unchanged.

Most pallet machinery companies are either large legacy houses with slow internal cycles, or small shops with no operational leverage. Jointec sits in the middle on purpose. We have six engineers in southern Sweden who specify, install and support every line we sell. We don't subcontract the parts that matter.

In the early days we built and sold our own machines. Over time we became the engineering house that pallet manufacturers across Scandinavia called when they needed something specific. That's how the Klotsproduktionslinje at Gyllsjö Träindustri started — and that installation, more than any other, has shaped how we engineer every machine since.

In 2026 we formalised an old relationship: Jointec is the exclusive agent for CAPE in Scandinavia, Switzerland and Austria. New units, refurbished units, full Jointec install and support. And our three own-developed machines — Klotsproduktionslinje, Plastning Nonstop, Topfoil Pallet — are sold worldwide. Two businesses, one engineering team.

principles.title: Spec before we sell.
principles.body: No binding quote without a site survey. We need to see the floor, the materials and the target throughput first.

principles.title: Engineering, not subcontracted.
principles.body: The same six people who specify the line also install and support it. The HMI you see on day one was wired by the person who picks up the phone in year five.

principles.title: Reversible upgrades.
principles.body: We don't strand customers on dead-end configurations. Modernisations preserve the original line value and the option to reverse the change.

principles.title: Demo floor, not brochure.
principles.body: Our Åsljunga facility runs the three own machines live. If you're considering a line, the cheapest evaluation is to come see it running.

footer.description: Pallet machinery engineered in Sweden since 1988. Exclusive CAPE agent for Scandinavia, Switzerland and Austria.
footer.tagline: Precise · sustainability-led · made on your own site.
